cards.title: AI-based learning material editor
cards.content:
tried implementing a sort of [CMS to create learning material (flashcards, exercises) with LLMs](https://github.com/koljapluemer/ai-based-learning-materials)...

![screenshot of the CMS](../media/img/project-graveyard/aibased.webp)

...wasn't really worth running as a standalone app
